reasoning: Initial state shows I=2.0, R=10.0, V=20.0. This suggests a possible relationship V = I * R (2 * 10 = 20). To verify, I will increase I and check if V changes proportionally.

The data collected so far (I=2.0, R=10.0, V=20.0) and (I=3.0, R=10.0, V=30.0) and (I=3.0, R=20.0, V=60.0) consistently satisfies the equation V = I * R. I have verified that V is directly proportional to both I and R. I have gathered sufficient evidence to conclude the relationship.
